Alexandria Franka Maria van Eekelen

'LEXIE'

Interactive Narrative Designer

Alexandria Franka Maria is...

An Utrecht-based game and interactive narrative designer, with her roots in D&D homebrew.

A Creative Media and Game Technologies graduate.

A master's student at PZI, pursuing a thesis on play as artistic development.

Interested in interactivity as a means to broach critical and educational topics.

Glad to receive a message about whatever!

GAMES ★ BSKY ★ LINKEDIN ★ BANDCAMP

alexandria.vaneekelen@gmail.com

shoebby#1212

RESUME

The Anders Cyclopaedia

(Graduation Project)

Lexicology and Exploration

An experiment of merging digital and pen & paper gameplay. Explore a parallel world and record its denizens to your Cyclopaedia.

Tags: Third-Person // Exploration // Puzzle
Engine: Unity (2022.3.10f1)
Dev Time: 20 weeks
Link: The Anders Cyclopaedia
Companion Paper: No Stupid Questions
Contributions
Art Modelling and texturing a 3D player model. Gameplay Establishing the core premise of the game.
Modelling and texturing 4 Andersian creatures. Concepting and designing the Cyclopaedia mechanic.
Modelling and texturing various environmental assets. Designing 5 main areas, each with their own puzzles and level elements.
Level Designing 3 explorable areas. Narrative Writing all of the game's dialogue.
Animation Rigging and animating each creature. Implementing narrative "pipe" scenes between explorable areas.
Rigging and making a portion of the animations for the player character. Writing the Cyclopaedia, with the addition of narrative tidbits to be used in puzzles.
Audio Production and implementation of various sound effects.
Production of 1 musical track
